'''salocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyneme|dyneme]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyneme|dyneme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| salocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sælecheth|sælecheth]] || [[word:sælechej|sælechej]] || [[word:sælechesh|sælechesh]] || [[word:sæleche|sæleche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:salolochoth|salolochoth]] || [[word:salolochoj|salolochoj]] || [[word:salolochosh|salolochosh]] || [[word:salolocho|salolocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:salochoth|salochoth]] || [[word:salochoj|salochoj]] || [[word:salochosh|salochosh]] || [[word:salocho|salocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:salofchofth|salofchofth]] || [[word:salofchofj|salofchofj]] || [[word:salofchofsh|salofchofsh]] || [[word:salofchof|salofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:salochotho|salochotho]] || [[word:salochojo|salochojo]] || [[word:salochosho|salochosho]] || [[word:salochoko|salochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:salochoth|salochoth]] || [[word:salochoj|salochoj]] || [[word:salochosh|salochosh]] || [[word:salocho|salocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:salochothol|salochothol]] || [[word:salochojol|salochojol]] || [[word:salochoshol|salochoshol]] || [[word:salochokol|salochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:salochoothotho|salochoothotho]] || [[word:salochoojojo|salochoojojo]] || [[word:salochooshosho|salochooshosho]] || [[word:salochooko|salochooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:salochothon|salochothon]] || [[word:salochojon|salochojon]] || [[word:salochoshon|salochoshon]] || [[word:salochokon|salochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:salochothooro|salochothooro]] || [[word:salochojooro|salochojooro]] || [[word:salochoshooro|salochoshooro]] || [[word:salochokooro|salochokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
